ddls:
CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the category image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the product belongs to */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the product was last updated */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Available stock quantity of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier of the product */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is currently active and available for sale */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product for shipping calculations */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions (length, width, height) of the product */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit (SKU) of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "store_description" TEXT /* Description of the store */,
  "store_address" TEXT /* Address of the store */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the store */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email of the store */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the store */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the store is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "store_products" (
  "store_product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store-product combination */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Available stock quantity of the product in the store */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is currently active in the store */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_store_products_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_store_products_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product sold */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the sale occurred */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity sold */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the sale (quantity * price) */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount applied to the sale */,
  "final_amount" REAL /* Final amount after applying discounts */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the sale (e.g., credit card, cash) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, sales manager, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being promoted */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store offering the promotion */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount offered */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the promotion expires */,
  "redemption_code" TEXT /* Redemption code for the promotion */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the promotion is currently active */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotion_redemptions" (
  "redemption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each redemption */,
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the promotion being redeemed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user redeeming the promotion */,
  "redemption_date" TEXT /* Date the promotion was redeemed */,
  "total_discount_amount" REAL /* Total discount amount redeemed */,
  "is_valid" INTEGER /* Indicates if the redemption is valid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("redemption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotion_redemptions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotion_redemptions_promotion_id FOREIGN KEY ("promotion_id") REFERENCES promotions ("promotion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sale being analyzed */,
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the promotion being analyzed */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the analytics data was created */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the sale (e.g., online, in-store) */,
  "is_promotion_applied" INTEGER /* Indicates if a promotion was applied to the sale */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_promotion_id FOREIGN KEY ("promotion_id") REFERENCES promotions ("promotion_id")
)
